hooks.command:
[ -n "$CLAUDE_PLUGINS_LOADED" ] || printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"

============================================================

   !!!  CLAUDE PLUGINS NOT LOADED  !!!

============================================================

   YOUR SESSION WILL NOT WORK CORRECTLY.

   The dev plugins under claude_plugins/ are not loaded.

   FIX:
     1. Quit Claude (press Ctrl+C twice)
     2. Run:  ./claude.sh
        NOT:  claude

============================================================

","continue":false}'
